title: activity — trait composition
description: Owns `HasActivityLog` — the opt-in trait that models declare to publish to the activity feed. Wraps spatie's `LogsActivity`. Our Activity model itself is a thin extension of spatie's.

owned.description: Opt-in trait for logging model lifecycle to the activity feed. Wraps spatie's `LogsActivity` and layers our defaults: causer resolved from Sanctum, tenant_id from the current TenancyResolver, ULID prefix `act_`, log_name defaulted to the model's kebab-case class name.
usedBy: any module opting a model into the activity feed
notes: Composes spatie's `LogsActivity` — do NOT also apply `LogsActivity` directly.
The model may still override `getActivitylogOptions()` per spatie's contract for finer control.
Adds a `activityFeed()` scope: hasMany Activity where subject_type = static::class, subject_id = row.id, ordered created_at desc.

usedBy: User model (auth module) — marks the causer

activity.notes: Our Activity model overrides spatie's + adds our conventions. `properties` JSONB stays intact for arbitrary payload.
